reviews.comment:
No me hospede en el hotel del ACA, para los lugareños es más conocida como la estación de río Colorado, en esa estación la nafta comienza a ser más barata desde ahi yendo hacia Chubut si vienen desde el lado de Bahía Blanca, siempre elijo cargar nafta en los YPF del ACA porque la tención es excelente, los promociones están vigentes, son limpias y por sobre todo la nafta no viene con impurezas.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't stay at the ACA hotel. Locals know it better as the Río Colorado station. At that station, gas starts to get cheaper from there when heading towards Chubut if you're coming from the Bahía Blanca side. I always choose to fill up at the YPF stations in the ACA because the service is excellent, the promotions are current, they're clean, and, above all, the gas doesn't come with impurities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURybF9XUVZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Sin piedad!!! El ACA te acomoda, me pasaron 84mil pesos para dos personas por 1 sola noche para descansar y seguir ruta al día siguiente.
Y acabo de pagar 39mil en pleno centro de San Martín de los Andes con desayuno incluido. 😂
Se pasan!! 👏🏼👏🏼

(Translated by Google)
No mercy!!! The ACA (Argentine Automobile Club) really takes advantage of you. They quoted me 84,000 pesos for two people for just one night to rest and continue the trip the next day.

And I just paid 39,000 pesos in the heart of San Martín de los Andes with breakfast included. 😂
They're unbelievable!! 👏🏼👏🏼
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURyNExEQWdnRRAB
